description_long: This is a low-top athletic sneaker, predominantly white, with a classic silhouette and a rounded toe box featuring perforations for breathability. The shoe displays a prominent Nike Swoosh logo on the side, rendered in blue with a green accent, and subtle yellow graphic details near the toe area. The upper appears to be made of smooth leather or synthetic leather, with visible stitching outlining the panels and reinforcing the structure. The lacing system is standard, with white laces threaded through eyelets, and the tongue is padded for comfort. The midsole is thick and white, providing cushioning, while the outsole is only partially visible but appears to be flat and suitable for urban surfaces. The overall design is clean and modern, suitable for casual wear in urban environments.
description: A white low-top sneaker with a blue and green Nike Swoosh, yellow graphic accents, and a classic athletic design. The shoe features perforations on the toe, white laces, and a thick cushioned sole.
description_view_0: The left rear side of the shoe is visible, highlighting the blue and green Nike Swoosh and the heel structure.
description_view_1: The right rear and top of the shoe are shown, emphasizing the padded collar, white laces, and yellow graphic detail near the toe.
description_view_2: A top-down view reveals the perforated toe box, white laces, and subtle yellow graphics on the side and toe area.
description_view_3: The right side of the shoe is displayed, showcasing the full blue and green Nike Swoosh and the clean white midsole.
attribute_logo: Nike Swoosh on the side in blue with a green accent
